meta.description: Facebook Selectors - WITH POST TYPE DETECTION - Oct 4 2025
meta.note: Added post_type_video, post_type_photo, post_type_link detection. Removed author_name (not needed).

strategies.description: ✅ Article with position - MAIN POSTS ONLY

strategies.path: .//div[contains(text(), 'Tất cả cảm xúc:')]/parent::*//span[string-length(normalize-space(text())) > 0 and string-length(normalize-space(text())) < 10 and translate(normalize-space(text()), '0123456789,.KM', '') = '']

comment_count.NOTE_CRITICAL: Facebook A/B testing - comment counts NOT displayed for many users/regions. VPS shows only 'Comment' button, no count. Local browser may show '6 bình luận' but VPS does not. This is NOT a selector issue - the HTML element does NOT exist!

strategies.path: .//span[contains(text(), ' bình luận') and string-length(normalize-space(text())) > 5 and string-length(normalize-space(text())) < 30 and not(contains(text(), 'Xem')) and not(contains(text(), 'Viết')) and not(contains(text(), 'thêm'))]
strategies.description: ✅ STRICT: Vietnamese 'X bình luận' (with space before)

strategies.path: .//span[contains(translate(text(), 'COMMENTS', 'comments'), ' comment') and string-length(normalize-space(text())) > 5 and string-length(normalize-space(text())) < 30 and not(contains(translate(text(), 'VIEW', 'view'), 'view')) and not(contains(translate(text(), 'WRITE', 'write'), 'write'))]

.//span[starts-with(normalize-space(text()), '0') or starts-with(normalize-space(text()), '1') or starts-with(normalize-space(text()), '2') or starts-with(normalize-space(text()), '3') or starts-with(normalize-space(text()), '4') or starts-with(normalize-space(text()), '5') or starts-with(normalize-space(text()), '6') or starts-with(normalize-space(text()), '7') or starts-with(normalize-space(text()), '8') or starts-with(normalize-space(text()), '9')][contains(text(), ' bình luận')]
strategies.description: ✅ STRICT: Starts with digit + ' bình luận' (with space)

strategies.path: .//span[starts-with(normalize-space(text()), '0') or starts-with(normalize-space(text()), '1') or starts-with(normalize-space(text()), '2') or starts-with(normalize-space(text()), '3') or starts-with(normalize-space(text()), '4') or starts-with(normalize-space(text()), '5') or starts-with(normalize-space(text()), '6') or starts-with(normalize-space(text()), '7') or starts-with(normalize-space(text()), '8') or starts-with(normalize-space(text()), '9')][contains(translate(text(), 'COMMENTS', 'comments'), ' comment')]
strategies.description: ✅ STRICT: Starts with digit + ' comment' (with space)

comment_count.note: Facebook changed HTML Nov 2024 - comment counts NO LONGER displayed. Will return 0 if not found.

strategies.description: ✅ Content in div[dir=auto] with min 30 chars

strategies.path: .//span[string-length(normalize-space(text())) > 30 and not(contains(text(), 'Xem tất cả')) and not(contains(text(), 'phản hồi')) and not(contains(text(), 'View all')) and not(contains(text(), 'replies')) and not(contains(text(), 'Photos from')) and not(contains(text(), 'Người tham gia')) and not(contains(text(), 'ẩn danh')) and not(contains(text(), 'Like')) and not(contains(text(), 'Comment')) and not(contains(text(), 'Share'))]
strategies.description: ✅ STRICT: Exclude buttons, metadata, min 30 chars

strategies.path: .//a[contains(@href, '?comment_id=') or contains(@href, '&comment_id=')]//span[contains(text(), 'phút') or contains(text(), 'giờ') or contains(text(), 'h') or contains(text(), 'min')]
strategies.description: ✅ Relative time spans (X phút, X giờ)
